title: Medieval Bills of Exchange | A Writer's Perspective - WordPress.com
highlights: The Florentine bankers had learned what they needed to do to fill the gap and came up with bills of exchange. Bills of exchange allowed a person in one country to pay someone in a different country and in a different currency. They were also a form of loan on which interest was charged. highlights: [allowed a person in one country to pay someone in a different country and in a different currency]
